title: 10 best herbal creams for eye irritation
description: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, creams helps with eye irritation because of its natural anti-inflammatory and cooling properties. The menthol content in peppermint creams helps to reduce swelling and ease redness in the eyes. It also has a soothing effect on the skin around the eyes, providing relief from itchiness and discomfort. This makes peppermint creams an effective remedy for relieving eye irritation caused by allergies, dryness, or exposure to irritants. Its natura...
